name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium shoulder bag features a D-ring for hanging removable items, adding practical functionality.
name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium shoulder bag features a D-ring for hanging removable items, adding practical functionality.
Black glossy leather
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Strap: Height 11.5 - 22.5cm; Length 72cm
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 450g
Model: 815216.
Dimensions: 31.5cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
